Service

Intake Process
Optimization

We redesign your intake workflow, implement technology, and train your team to convert more prospects into clients.

The Problem

Your marketing is driving 100 leads per month. But:

  • 20 leads drop off because your intake form is too long
  • 15 leads are lost in the gap between form submission and phone call
  • 10 leads fall through because phone intake isn't consistent
  • 8 leads aren't followed up on because they're in multiple systems

You're wasting 53% of your marketing budget. And even worse, you have no data about what type of prospect actually becomes a retained client—so you can't optimize your marketing to attract better prospects.

What We Do

Audit Current Process

We examine your forms, phone intake, coordinators, follow-up process, and CRM. We identify where leads are lost and why.

Redesign Workflow

We create a new intake process optimized for conversion: shorter forms, faster phone contact, consistent qualification, better data capture.

Implement Technology

We set up CRM, intake forms, phone systems, and integrations so data flows automatically and coordinators have all information they need.

Train Your Team

We train coordinators on the new process and tools. We document the workflow. We set up metrics to track performance.

The Outcome

  • ✓ 25-30% improvement in form-to-phone conversion
  • ✓ 15-20% improvement in phone-to-consultation conversion
  • ✓ Intake team that's less overwhelmed and more organized
  • ✓ Better data about prospect quality that feeds back to marketing
  • ✓ On a 100-lead-per-month firm, that's 10-15 additional retained clients per month from the same marketing budget

Let's Optimize Your Intake

Schedule a free consultation to review your current intake process.

Schedule a Call →
